source: Public Service Commission of the District of Columbia
source_note: Order and Opinion of the Public Service Commission of the District of Columbia in the application of Potomac Electric Power Company (Pepco) for authority to implement a Multiyear Rate Plan for electric distribution service, Formal Case No. 1176, issued November 26, 2024 (approved a modified plan well below the ~$190.7M request; later vacated/remanded by the DC Court of Appeals). Listed for reference (metadata-only). Source: DC PSC e-Docket, edocket.dcpsc.org (attachId 214935). The DC PSC publishes on dcpsc.org (an official US-government commission that uses .org, not .gov; admitted via the gov-guard's narrow .org allowlist — see ISSUES.md).
